_description: Consolidated aggregated results for ABR-PINN (Applied Energy APEN-D-26-09704 major revision). Original 4-scenario benchmark + 6 reviewer-requested revision experiments. mean/std over 5 seeds [42,123,456,789,1024] unless noted.

byzantine_consensus_public.note: NASA cells treated as 3 distributed monitors, replicated to 16; constant_bias attack on f=5 logical nodes.
